action_set_definitions.name: get_inventory_status
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current stock levels for all product SKUs in the inventory.

action_set_definitions.name: get_market_pricing
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves current pricing data for all SKUs, including the Agent's current set price and the average competitor price.

action_set_definitions.name: set_price
action_set_definitions.description: Sets a new unit price for a specific SKU. Note: Prices must not be set below the $180.00 floor.

sku_id.description: The unique identifier of the product SKU.

price.description: The new unit price to apply.

action_set_definitions.name: step_simulation
action_set_definitions.description: Advances the environment by a specified number of discrete time steps (e.g., days). During each step, sales are calculated based on price and demand, and inventory/revenue are updated.

num_steps.description: The number of time steps to advance.

action_set_definitions.name: get_financial_status
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves current financial performance metrics, specifically the cumulative revenue earned so far.

state_description.inventory_levels: A mapping of product IDs to their current stock counts.
state_description.current_prices: A mapping of product IDs to their current unit prices set by the Agent.
state_description.competitor_prices: A mapping of product IDs to the current average market/competitor price.
state_description.price_elasticity: A mapping of product IDs to their price sensitivity coefficients.
state_description.market_demand_index: A global multiplier representing current market demand (e.g., 1.0 is baseline, 1.5 is peak season).
state_description.cumulative_revenue: The total revenue accumulated across all products since the start of the simulation.
state_description.cumulative_units_sold: A mapping of product IDs to total units sold so far.
